# Review TODOs for the architecture documentation

- #TODO - #REVIEW also allows to upload a **user preferences** configuration file, that can update visualisation defaults. How should this work within the current architecture ? priority of configs would be desireable.

- #TODO - #REVIEW : how should the process of eg, filtering data to update plots for data exploration. Should the process handled by polars (request sent by user) wich then sends to polar and resent a new plot to the dashboard ? or should we have a "filtered view" in memory that is updated by the Controler Orchestrator and sent to the Viz Factory when user changes a filter ? THIS NEEDS TO BE CLEAR (need in term to be able to handle large amount of data to make dashboard as light and reactive as possible)
